summary: Iteration 79 - Frontend Testing for Gallery Pricing Card and PhotoToolsDrawer role-based visibility. All features verified PASS via UI testing for Photographer role and code review for Grom Parent restrictions.

minor.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error (seen in console logs)

gallery_pricing_card_4_columns.details: Gallery Pricing card displays 4 columns: Gallery Photos, Videos, Live Session, On-Demand

live_session_column_resolution_pricing.details: Live Session column shows Web-Res ($3), Standard ($5), High-Res ($10), and 'Included in Buy-in' (3 photos)

on_demand_column_resolution_pricing.details: On-Demand column shows Web-Res ($3), Standard ($10), High-Res ($10)

photo_tools_drawer_for_photographer.details: PhotoToolsDrawer shows all menu items for Photographer role: On-Demand toggle, Live Sessions, My Gallery, Bookings, Earnings, On-Demand Settings, Your Stats

grom_parent_live_sessions_hidden.details: Code at PhotoToolsDrawer.js lines 57, 139-153 correctly hides Live Sessions menu for Grom Parent (canUseLiveSessions = !isGromParent)

grom_parent_on_demand_hidden.details: Code at PhotoToolsDrawer.js lines 60, 269-320 correctly hides On-Demand toggle for Grom Parent (canUseOnDemand = ['Photographer', 'Pro', 'Approved Pro'].includes(effectiveRole))

grom_parent_restriction_banner.details: Code at PhotoToolsDrawer.js lines 252-266 correctly shows restriction banner for Grom Parent with message 'Gallery & Bookings access only. Live Sessions and On-Demand are not available.'

critical_code_review_comments: PhotoToolsDrawer.js: Role-based visibility logic is correctly implemented with isGromParent, canUseLiveSessions, canUseOnDemand checks
GalleryPage.js: Gallery Pricing Card correctly displays 4 columns with resolution-based pricing for all tiers
The /api/photographer/{id}/stats endpoint returns 500 error - low priority as it doesn't affect core functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Grom Parent role-based restrictions verified via code review since no Grom Parent test user exists. The code correctly: 1) Hides Live Sessions menu for Grom Parent, 2) Hides On-Demand toggle for Grom Parent, 3) Shows restriction banner for Grom Parent. Gallery Pricing Card shows all 4 columns with resolution-based pricing.
notes: No Grom Parent test user in database, so role-based hiding verified via code review. The conditional rendering logic in PhotoToolsDrawer.js is correct and will hide Live Sessions and On-Demand for Grom Parent role.
